response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, device orchestration tools, MCP code generators). However, this is a people-management role requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, conducting performance reviews, or leading organizational change. Mobile experience is limited to one iOS/Apple TV stint, and there is no demonstrated experience with build systems or testing infrastructure at large-platform scale.
strengths: Deep, hands-on developer-tools background: authored test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD and dev-ops infrastructure, and device orchestration tooling
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong engineering-culture contributions: TDD advocacy, workshops, refactoring dojos, and teaching/mentoring via courses
concerns: No formal people-management experience (one-on-ones, performance management, team development)
Career trajectory is IC-focused; no evidence of setting team priorities, roadmaps, or leading organizational change
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth and no experience running engineering productivity at large scale
